introSection: Wickie Coaster is a steel enclosed roller coaster located at Plopsa Indoor Hasselt in Hasselt, Limburg, Flemish Region, Belgium. From 2005 to 2012, it was formerly known as Piratenbaan.
fullText: Wickie Coaster is a steel enclosed roller coaster located at Plopsa Indoor Hasselt in Hasselt, Limburg, Flemish Region, Belgium. From 2005 to 2012, it was formerly known as Piratenbaan.
